name: AARP_WMS_HAREKETLERI_FIYATLI_123_WIP
definition:
--4706
create VIEW [dbo].[AARP_WMS_HAREKETLERI_FIYATLI_123_WIP] AS 
SELECT 
ISNULL((SELECT P.PROJE_KODU FROM EVIRA..PROJE P WHERE P.PROJE_REF=SF.PROJE_REF),'PROJESIZ') PROJE_KODU,
ISNULL((SELECT P.PROJE_ADI FROM EVIRA..PROJE P WHERE P.PROJE_REF=SF.PROJE_REF),'PROJESIZ') PROJE_ADI,
	SF.TARIH,
	SF.FIS_NO ,
	AMBAR_KODU=(SELECT AMBAR_KODU+','+AMBAR_ADI FROM EVIRA..AMBAR WHERE AMBAR_KODU=SH.AMBAR_KODU),
	HEDEF_AMBAR=(SELECT AMBAR_KODU+','+AMBAR_ADI FROM EVIRA..AMBAR WHERE AMBAR_KODU=SH.HEDEF_AMBAR),
	FIS_TURU =(SELECT FIS_ADI FROM EVIRA..FISTURLERI WHERE FIS_TURU=SF.FIS_TURU),
	ISLEMTIPI= CASE SF.FIS_GCD WHEN '0' THEN 'GIRIS' WHEN '1' THEN 'TUKETIM' WHEN '2' THEN 'TRANSFER' ELSE 'YOK' END,
	 FIRMA=
	
	CASE WHEN (SELECT FIRMA_UNVANI FROM EVIRA..FIRMAKARTI WHERE FIRMA_REF=SH.FIRMA_REF) IS NULL
	THEN
	(SELECT FIRMA_UNVANI FROM EVIRA..SIPARISFISLERI SF , EVIRA..FIRMAKARTI FK WHERE SF.FIRMA_REF=FK.FIRMA_REF AND SF.SB_REF=SH.SB_REF)
	ELSE
	(SELECT FIRMA_UNVANI FROM EVIRA..FIRMAKARTI WHERE FIRMA_REF=SH.FIRMA_REF)
	END,
	SK.STOK_KODU,
	SK.STOK_ADI,
SUM(MIKTAR) MIKTAR,
	BIRIM=(SELECT BIRIM FROM EVIRA..STOKBIRIM WHERE BIRIM_REF=ANABIRIM_REF)	,
	KULLANICI=(SELECT KULLANICI_ADI +' - ' + ADI_SOYADI FROM EVIRA..KULLANICI WHERE KULLANICI_REF=SF.KULLANICI_REF)	,
	TAKIP_NO,
	SUM(MIKTAR) * CAST(
	ISNULL(CASE WHEN (sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 AND DATE_<=SF.TARIH  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN 
	(SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=SK.STOK_REF AND PTYPE=1 ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC) ELSE 
	
	(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=14 AND DATE_<=SF.TARIH  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS FIYAT



	,CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	
	(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 AND DATE_<=SF.TARIH  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=SK.STOK_REF AND PTYPE=1 ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=14 AND DATE_<=SF.TARIH  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float) AS BIRIMFIYAT
	------
		--,
	--(ISNULL
	--((SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 AND DATE_<=SF.TARIH  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC), (ISNULL ((SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=SK.STOK_REF AND PTYPE=1 ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC ),
	
 --(sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=14 AND DATE_<=SF.TARIH  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC )) ))) 'BIRIMFIYAT33'

	-------

	
	--,CAST(
	--ISNULL
	--(CASE WHEN 
	
	--(sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=SK.STOK_REF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC ) 
	
	
	--ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS float) AS mtl
	------------------
	,(sELECT S.CYPHCODE  FROM LG_123_ITEMS S WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE S.LOGICALREF=SK.STOK_REF ) AS SARF_DURUMU

	----------------------------------

FROM 
	EVIRA..STOKKARTI SK ,
	EVIRA..STOKFISLERI SF,
	EVIRA..STOKHAREKETLERI SH
WHERE 
	SK.STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF
	AND SH.FB_REF=SF.FB_REF
	AND SH.FIS_TURU IN (01,12,13,300,302,303,304,305,306,307,308,309,900,903,904)
	--AND SH.FIS_TURU NOT IN (100,51,50)
	--AND SF.TARIH>=@P_TARIH1 AND SF.TARIH<=@P_TARIH2
	--AND SF.FIS_GCD=2 AND SK.STOK_ADI='GLADIATOR SISTEM PANOSU CBE 180 MPPT 20A'
	and sk.STOK_TIPI<>11
	--AND SK.STOK_KODU='GLPT0099Y001'
GROUP BY 
	SK.STOK_KODU,STOK_ADI,TARIH,FIS_NO,SH.AMBAR_KODU,SH.HEDEF_AMBAR,SH.FIS_TURU,SF.FIS_GCD,SH.FIRMA_REF,SH.ANABIRIM_REF,SF.KULLANICI_REF,SH.TAKIP_NO
	,SH.STOK_REF,SH.PAKET,SH.HEDEF_PAKET,SF.SAAT,SF.SB_REF,SF.FIS_TURU,SH.SB_REF
	,SF.PROJE_REF,SF.BELGE_NO,SK.STOK_REF

	--SELECT *FROM EVIRA..STOKKARTI
	--sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WHERE CODE='DSXX1528H028') AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC
	--sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WHERE CODE='DSXX1528H028') AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC
	UNION ALL

	SELECT 
ISNULL((SELECT P.PROJE_KODU FROM EVIRA..PROJE P WHERE P.PROJE_REF=SF.PROJE_REF),'PROJESIZ') PROJE_KODU,
ISNULL((SELECT P.PROJE_ADI FROM EVIRA..PROJE P WHERE P.PROJE_REF=SF.PROJE_REF),'PROJESIZ') PROJE_ADI,
	SF.TARIH,
	SF.FIS_NO ,
	AMBAR_KODU=(SELECT AMBAR_KODU+','+AMBAR_ADI FROM EVIRA..AMBAR WHERE AMBAR_KODU=SH.AMBAR_KODU),
	HEDEF_AMBAR=(SELECT AMBAR_KODU+','+AMBAR_ADI FROM EVIRA..AMBAR WHERE AMBAR_KODU=SH.HEDEF_AMBAR),
	FIS_TURU =(SELECT FIS_ADI FROM EVIRA..FISTURLERI WHERE FIS_TURU=SF.FIS_TURU),
	ISLEMTIPI= CASE SF.FIS_GCD WHEN '0' THEN 'GIRIS' WHEN '1' THEN 'TUKETIM' WHEN '2' THEN 'TRANSFER' ELSE 'YOK' END,
	 FIRMA=
	
	CASE WHEN (SELECT FIRMA_UNVANI FROM EVIRA..FIRMAKARTI WHERE FIRMA_REF=SH.FIRMA_REF) IS NULL
	THEN
	(SELECT FIRMA_UNVANI FROM EVIRA..SIPARISFISLERI SF , EVIRA..FIRMAKARTI FK WHERE SF.FIRMA_REF=FK.FIRMA_REF AND SF.SB_REF=SH.SB_REF)
	ELSE
	(SELECT FIRMA_UNVANI FROM EVIRA..FIRMAKARTI WHERE FIRMA_REF=SH.FIRMA_REF)
	END,
	SK.STOK_KODU,
	SK.STOK_ADI,
SUM(MIKTAR) MIKTAR,
	BIRIM=(SELECT BIRIM FROM EVIRA..STOKBIRIM WHERE BIRIM_REF=ANABIRIM_REF)	,
	KULLANICI=(SELECT KULLANICI_ADI +' - ' + ADI_SOYADI FROM EVIRA..KULLANICI WHERE KULLANICI_REF=SF.KULLANICI_REF)	,
	TAKIP_NO,
	SUM(MIKTAR) * CAST(
	ISNULL(CASE WHEN (sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=13 AND DATE_<=SF.TARIH  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN 
	(SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=SK.STOK_REF AND PTYPE=1 ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC) ELSE 
	(sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=14  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS FIYAT



	,CAST(CAST(
	ISNULL
	(CASE WHEN 
	(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=13 AND DATE_<=SF.TARIH   ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=SK.STOK_REF AND PTYPE=1 ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=14  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float) AS BIRIMFIYAT

	----
	
	--,CAST(CAST(
	--ISNULL
	--(CASE WHEN 
	
	--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND LPRODSTAT=0 AND  TRCODE=13 AND DATE_<=SF.TARIH  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) ISNULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=SK.STOK_REF AND PTYPE=1 ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	--ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 LINENET/NULLIF(AMOUNT,0) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=14  ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float) AS BIRIMFIYAT11
	

	--,CAST(
	--ISNULL
	--(CASE WHEN 
	
	--(sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=SK.STOK_REF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC ) 
	
	
	--ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=SK.STOK_REF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS float) AS mtl
	------------------
	,(SELECT S.CYPHCODE  FROM LG_123_ITEMS S WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE S.LOGICALREF=SK.STOK_REF ) AS SARF_DURUMU

	----------------------------------


FROM 
	EVIRA..STOKKARTI SK ,
	EVIRA..STOKFISLERI SF,
	EVIRA..STOKHAREKETLERI SH
WHERE 
	SK.STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF
	AND SH.FB_REF=SF.FB_REF
	AND SH.FIS_TURU IN (01,12,13,300,302,303,304,305,306,307,308,309,900,903,904)
	--AND SH.FIS_TURU NOT IN (100,51,50)
	--AND SF.TARIH>=@P_TARIH1 AND SF.TARIH<=@P_TARIH2
	--AND SF.FIS_GCD=2 
	AND SK.STOK_KODU='GLMK3152Y001'
	and sk.STOK_TIPI=11
GROUP BY 
	SK.STOK_KODU,STOK_ADI,TARIH,FIS_NO,SH.AMBAR_KODU,SH.HEDEF_AMBAR,SH.FIS_TURU,SF.FIS_GCD,SH.FIRMA_REF,SH.ANABIRIM_REF,SF.KULLANICI_REF,SH.TAKIP_NO
	,SH.STOK_REF,SH.PAKET,SH.HEDEF_PAKET,SF.SAAT,SF.SB_REF,SF.FIS_TURU,SH.SB_REF
	,SF.PROJE_REF,SF.BELGE_NO,SK.STOK_REF

sample_data.FIRMA: NURGAZ GAZ ARMATÜRLERİ METAL İŞLEME VE ELEKTRİK PAZARLAMA SAN.TİC.LTD.ŞTİ.
